title: GPS Architecture Overview
content:
# GPS Architecture

This page captures the current state of GPS architecture.

## Key Decisions
- Adopt zero-trust networking
- Shift to managed identity

## Open Questions
- Data residency constraints
- DR topology for active-active

title: Security & Compliance Notes
content:
# Security & Compliance Notes

This document summarizes security requirements and audit controls.

## Controls
- MFA for admin access
- Immutable audit logs
- Data retention
